name: ARTS at Marks Garage
tagline: Honolulu's community arts hub — rotating exhibitions, makers' markets, and the heartbeat of Chinatown's First Friday scene.
bestTime: First Friday of every month for the art walk; regular gallery hours during the week
talkStory: Honolulu's community arts hub rotates exhibitions across painting, photography, sculpture, and mixed media, and hosts film screenings, makers' markets, and performance art. The space supports local and emerging artists and feels genuinely grassroots. First Friday nights here are electric — the gallery opens late, the streets fill with people, and art spills onto the sidewalk. This is the heartbeat of Honolulu's creative scene.
